title: Introduction to cloud infrastructure: Apply Azure skills in guided projects
summary: Hands-on guided projects that are part of the Azure Infrastructure fundamentals content.

sections.title: Introduction to cloud infrastructure: Apply Azure skills in guided projects
sections.summary: Hands-on guided projects that are part of the Azure Infrastructure fundamentals content.

lessons.title: Guided project: Deploy a static website with Azure Blob Storage
lessons.content_md:
Host a public website directly from Azure Blob Storage without managing servers.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/guided-project-deploy-static-website-blob-storage/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Guided project: Deploy a static website with Azure Blob Storage

lessons.title: Guided project: Organize and protect resources with tags and locks
lessons.content_md:
Apply resource tags for organization and resource locks to prevent accidental changes.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/guided-project-organize-resources-tags-locks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Guided project: Organize and protect resources with tags and locks

lessons.title: Guided Project: Build a simple website endpoint with Azure Functions
lessons.content_md:
Create and test an HTTP-triggered Azure Function as a lightweight website endpoint.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/guided-project-build-basic-website-endpoint-with-functions/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Guided Project: Build a simple website endpoint with Azure Functions

lessons.title: Guided Project: Set up new employee access (Entra ID and RBAC)
lessons.content_md:
Configure a basic identity and RBAC onboarding flow for a new team member.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/guided-project-new-employee-access/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Guided Project: Set up new employee access (Entra ID and RBAC)

lessons.title: Guided project: Share files securely
lessons.content_md:
Use Azure Storage, stored access policies, and SAS to share files securely with time-limited access.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/guided-project-share-files-securely/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Guided project: Set up cost guardrails in Azure
lessons.content_md:
Apply basic cost governance with tags, budget alerts, and policy constraints.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/guided-project-cost-guardrails/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Guided project: Set up cost guardrails in Azure

lessons.title: Guided project: Monitor Azure with Service Health and Activity Log alerts
lessons.content_md:
Set up proactive monitoring with Service Health alerts and Activity Log alerts without paid compute resources.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/guided-project-monitor-service-health-activity-alerts/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Guided project: Monitor Azure with Service Health and Activity Log alerts

lessons.title: Guided project: Manage Azure resources with Cloud Shell and the Azure CLI
lessons.content_md:
Create, query, tag, and clean up Azure resources using Cloud Shell and Azure CLI commands.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/guided-project-manage-resources-cloud-shell-cli/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Guided project: Manage Azure resources with Cloud Shell and the Azure CLI

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Introduction to cloud infrastructure: Apply Azure skills in guided projects
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Introduction to cloud infrastructure: Apply Azure skills in guided projects**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
